subcodes.first_line: God, no God is there but Him, Who speaketh in all things. Verily, there is none other God but Him. His is the glory and the majesty [3.5s]... ...Soon will the cry, 'Yea, yea, here am I, here am I' be heard from every land. For there hath never been, nor can there ever be, any other refuge to fly to for anyone
subcodes.first_line_orig: الله لا اله الا هو الذی ینطق فیکل شیء انه لا اله الا هو له العزه و الجلال
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @power of prayer, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih
